name: Newport Gold, Inc.
business: Newport Gold, Inc. is a pre-exploration stage company involved in the acquisition, exploration and development of mineral and energy properties. It holds a 100% undivided interest in the Burnt Basin mineral claims in British Columbia, Canada, subject to a 1% NSR royalty. The company has not yet generated any operating revenue and has no known ore reserves.

exposures.sentence: Newport Gold, Inc., a pre-exploration stage company, was incorporated on July 16, 2003 in the State of Nevada, and is involved in the acquisition, exploration and development of mineral and energy properties.

catalysts.event: Commence Phase 1 exploration program on Burnt Basin property
catalysts.sentence: Assuming we are successful in raising needed funds, we expect to commence the Phase 1 program as soon as possible in 2013 and hope to complete Phase 1 during 2013.

catalysts.event: Commence Phase 2 exploration program (contingent on Phase 1 results)
catalysts.sentence: The updated Phase 2 program, which is contingent on the results achieved in the Phase 1 program, will hopefully be able to commence in the latter part of 2013 or into 2014.
